expectations.text: Correctly identifies this as a pyannote gated model access issue
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies pyannote/speaker-diarization-3.1 as the gated model

expectations.text: Mentions the HF_TOKEN environment variable requirement
expectations.evidence: References HF_TOKEN env var and diarize.py line 30

expectations.text: Directs user to accept the model license at the HuggingFace model page
expectations.evidence: Links to both speaker-diarization-3.1 and segmentation-3.0 model pages

expectations.text: Explains why hot pass works (uses whisper, no pyannote) while cold pass fails
expectations.evidence: Detailed code path explanation for both passes with line numbers

expectations.text: Mentions that cold pass can still work without diarization (graceful fallback)
expectations.evidence: References try/except in cold_pass.py lines 62-69 and --no-diarize flag
